email_subject: Application for Customer Service Medewerker at Synergie Geel
email_body:
Dear Synergie Geel team,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker position in Meerhout, as advertised. With a background in logistics at Katoen Natie and strong administrative and communication skills, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

In my role at Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment, which gave me hands-on experience with the fast-paced nature of transport and logistics. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am comfortable with order processing, client coordination, and handling inquiries via phone and email.

I am eager to bring my organizational skills and enthusiasm to this role. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker position at Synergie Geel, based in Meerhout. With my recent experience in logistics at Katoen Natie and a strong administrative skill set, I am well-prepared to handle the responsibilities of order input, client coordination, and complaint management.

At Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment where accuracy and efficiency were paramount. This experience gave me a solid understanding of logistics operations and the importance of clear communication. I am comfortable with order processing, tracking bookings, and following up on changes or cancellations. I am also skilled in handling client inquiries via phone and email, ensuring a professional and helpful tone.

I speak English fluently and Turkish natively, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I am confident in my ability to communicate effectively with clients and colleagues. Additionally, my background in digital marketing has honed my organizational and multitasking abilities, which will serve me well in this role.

I am enthusiastic about the opportunity to grow within your company and contribute to your team. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how my skills align with your needs.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Experience in logistics at Katoen Natie, maintaining accuracy in a high-volume environment.
Strong administrative and organizational skills from digital marketing and web projects.
Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.
Proficient in order processing, client coordination, and communication via phone and email.
Quick learner with a technical foundation, adaptable to new tools and platforms.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on experience in logistics and strong administrative skills. At Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am comfortable with order processing, client coordination, and communication via phone and email. Quick to learn new systems and tools, I am eager to contribute to a customer service team in the logistics sector.

CORE SKILLS
- Logistics & order processing: order input, client coordination, booking follow-up, complaint handling
- Administrative: data entry, tracking, reporting, documentation
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Communication: client contact via phone and email, professional correspondence
- Digital tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, CRM systems (familiar)
- SEO & content: on-page SEO, keyword research, content management (WordPress)
- Analytics: Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
